name: Mark Badham
title: Head Coach & Founder
bio: Mark is the founder of The Brazilian Jiu Jitsu Academy and co-founder of the British Army Brazilian Jiu Jitsu team. Training since 2011, Mark has competed in prestigious international competitions and brings a wealth of technical knowledge and competitive experience to every class.
lineage: Mitsuyo Maeda → Carlos Gracie → Helio Gracie → Carlos Gracie Jr → Roger Gracie → Andy Roberts → Mark Badham

name: James Thornton
title: Gi Coach
bio: James has been training BJJ and submission grappling for over eight years, with a particular focus on No-Gi competition. A former amateur MMA competitor, James brings a dynamic, athletic approach to his classes and specialises in wrestling and leg lock systems.

name: Tyler Hughes
title: Head No-Gi Coach
bio: Sophie leads our junior programme and has a natural ability to connect with young students. With five years of training and a background in youth coaching, Sophie creates a positive, energetic environment where children thrive — developing not just BJJ skills but confidence and character.
